title: Ego fight between senior citizens: Bombay High Court adjourns defamation suit to 2046
description: The Bombay High Court has adjourned a 9-year-old defamation suit to be heard in the year 2046 after finding that the case was an “ego fight” between two senior citizens [Tarinibahen Desai and Anr v. Kilkilraj Bhansali and Ors]In an order dated April 28, Justice Jitendra Jain said that the Court's time should be utilised to hear more pressing cases and hence, the matter should not be taken up for the next 20 years. “This is one of the matters where the ego fight between the parties at their
